summary: Session 072 — PRIMARY: TQUANTA2 sovereign tool partition setup. Mount TQUANTA2 at /mnt/TQUANTA2/, design directory structure (tools/, binaries/, datasets/, sovereign/), wire into Ethica so Trinity can reach and invoke tools. J.A.R.V.I.S. bug bounty stack (nuclei, httpx, subfinder, amass) are first residents. SECONDARY: Full Tool Lister audit, anomaly detection end-to-end test. VOICE: XTTS dormant — pyttsx3 active. RULES: surgical always, chmod u+w before patch, never cd ~/Ethica, AUTO_FIX all False, on_done_rule, two_drop_zones_rule, ollama_vs_llama_rule, noqa_rule, xtts_dormant_rule.
